variants.label: Cold Open
variants.subject: Quick question about {{business_name}}
variants.body: {{opener}} I help business owners in {{city}} explore what their business could sell for. Worth a quick chat?

variants.label: Bump
variants.subject: Re: Quick question about {{business_name}}
variants.body: Hey, just checking in — did you get my last email?

variants.label: Case Study
variants.subject: Sold a {{industry}} in {{city}} recently
variants.body: {{opener}} We sold a {{industry}} a couple weeks ago in your area. Owner walked away with more than he expected. Happy to share what we learned.

variants.label: Free Value
variants.subject: Free guide for {{industry}} owners
variants.body: {{opener}} I put together a short PDF on the 3 things that increase what a {{industry}} sells for. Want me to send it over?

config_notes: Bryce fills in real copy before launch. Map instantly_step_id after configuring variants in Instantly UI.
